releases.label: Hubble Source Catalog v3
releases.summary: HSC v3 — 25% more ACS/WFC images and more than twice as many WFC3 images vs v2; photometry improvements and Gaia DR1-based astrometric calibration; added MAD magnitude-scatter statistic and spectroscopic cross-matching

releases.label: Hubble Source Catalog v3.1
releases.summary: Current HSC version — added proper motions for over 400,000 objects in the SWEEPS field with time baselines up to 12 years; HSC v4 (based on Hubble Advanced Products, +8 years of observations) announced as upcoming

releases.label: MAST archive (ongoing)
releases.summary: HST has a rolling archive rather than versioned DRs: all data become public on MAST after the (typically) 12-month proprietary period. Major legacy/treasury fields: HDF, HUDF, CANDELS, COSMOS, Frontier Fields.
